heif.boxes

Class Box

  • java.lang.Object
    • heif.boxes.Box
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    CleanApertureBox, ColourInformationBox, DataInformationBox, FileTypeBox, FullBox, ImageMirrorBox, ImageRotationBox, ItemDataBox, ItemPropertiesBox, ItemPropertiesBox.ItemPropertyContainerBox, ItemReferenceBox.SingleItemTypeReferenceBox, PixelAspectRatioBox

    public class Box
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a generic HEIF Box, according to ISO/IEC 14496-12:2015. Handles both standard boxes and uuid extended boxes.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static long BOX_SIZE_TO_EOF  
      private long boxSize  
      private byte[] boxTypeBytes  
      private int hierarchyDepth  
      private static logger.LogFactory LOGGER  
      static int MIN_BOX_LENGTH  
      private Box parent  
      private long startPosition  
      private HeifBoxType type  
      private int typeCode  
      private java.lang.String userType  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Box(Box box)
      A copy constructor to replicate field values one by one, useful for sub-classing, retaining the original field values.
      Box(ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a Box by reading its header from the specified ByteStreamReader.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long available(ByteStreamReader reader)
      Returns the number of remaining bytes in the box.
      java.util.List<Box> getBoxList()
      Returns a list of child boxes, if applicable.
      long getBoxSize()
      Returns the total size of this box, or Long.MAX_VALUE if size is unknown.
      long getEndPosition()
      Calculates the absolute stream offset where this box ends.
      java.lang.String getFourCC()
      Returns the Four-Character Code (FourCC) identifying the box type.
      HeifBoxType getHeifType()
      Returns the HeifBoxType of this box.
      int getHierarchyDepth()
      Returns the depth of this box within the box hierarchy.
      Box getParent()
      Returns the parent box of this child box for referencing purposes
      long getStartOffset()
      Returns the absolute stream offset where this box begins.
      int getTypeCode()
      Returns the 32-bit integer representation (FourCC) of the box type.
      java.lang.String getUserType()
      Returns the user type for a uuid box, or an empty string if not applicable.
      void logBoxInfo()
      Logs the box hierarchy and internal entry data at the debug level.
      void setHierarchyDepth(int depth)
      Sets this box's hierarchical depth of this box.
      void setParent(Box outerbox)
      Sets the parent of this child box.
      protected void validateBounds(Box child)
      Ensures the child box resides within the parent's byte boundaries.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Box

        public Box(ByteStreamReader reader)
    throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a Box by reading its header from the specified ByteStreamReader.
        Parameters:
        reader - the byte reader for parsing
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an I/O error occurs
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the standard box size is illegal

      • Box

        public Box(Box box)
        A copy constructor to replicate field values one by one, useful for sub-classing, retaining the original field values.
        Parameters:
        box - the box to copy

    • Method Detail

      • available

        public long available(ByteStreamReader reader)
               throws java.io.IOException
        Returns the number of remaining bytes in the box.
        Parameters:
        reader - the stream reader for calculating the remaining bytes allowed to be used based on the current position
        Returns:
        remaining bytes
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if there is an I/O error
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - the box size is unknown, possibly due to a malformed structure

      • getStartOffset

        public long getStartOffset()
        Returns the absolute stream offset where this box begins.

        This offset is the position of the first byte of the box header (the start of the 4-byte size field).

        Returns:
        the absolute byte position in the stream

      • getEndPosition

        public long getEndPosition()
        Calculates the absolute stream offset where this box ends.

        This value serves as a boundary to ensure the start of the next box can be accurately located, even if any box constructor fails to consume all its allocated bytes.

        Returns:
        the absolute byte position of the next box in the stream

      • setParent

        public void setParent(Box outerbox)
        Sets the parent of this child box.
        Parameters:
        outerbox - the Box referencing to the parent box

      • getParent

        public Box getParent()
        Returns the parent box of this child box for referencing purposes
        Returns:
        the parent Box

      • setHierarchyDepth

        public void setHierarchyDepth(int depth)
        Sets this box's hierarchical depth of this box. The root box has a depth of 0. Each level below increases the depth by 1.
        Parameters:
        depth - the depth of this box

      • getHierarchyDepth

        public int getHierarchyDepth()
        Returns the depth of this box within the box hierarchy.
        Returns:
        the depth of this box in the hierarchy

      • getFourCC

        public java.lang.String getFourCC()
        Returns the Four-Character Code (FourCC) identifying the box type.
        Returns:
        the 4-character box type string, for example: "meta", "iinf", etc

      • getTypeCode

        public int getTypeCode()
        Returns the 32-bit integer representation (FourCC) of the box type.

        This numeric value allows for high-efficiency comparisons and is used as the key for HeifBoxType resolution.

        Returns:
        the integer type code

      • getBoxSize

        public long getBoxSize()
        Returns the total size of this box, or Long.MAX_VALUE if size is unknown.
        Returns:
        the box size

      • getUserType

        public java.lang.String getUserType()
        Returns the user type for a uuid box, or an empty string if not applicable.
        Returns:
        the user type

      • getHeifType

        public HeifBoxType getHeifType()
        Returns the HeifBoxType of this box.
        Returns:
        the type

      • getBoxList

        public java.util.List<Box> getBoxList()
        Returns a list of child boxes, if applicable. Default is empty.
        Returns:
        list of contained boxes

      • logBoxInfo

        public void logBoxInfo()
        Logs the box hierarchy and internal entry data at the debug level.

        It provides a visual representation of the box's HEIF/ISO-BMFF structure. It is intended for tree traversal and file inspection during development and degugging if required.

      • validateBounds

        protected void validateBounds(Box child)
                       throws java.lang.IllegalStateException
        Ensures the child box resides within the parent's byte boundaries.
        Parameters:
        child - the box to validate against this parent's limits
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the child boundary exceeds the parent boundary
